channel.title: New England Journal of Medicine
channel.description: The most trusted, influential source of new medical knowledge.

item.title: Empagliflozin in Patients with Chronic Kidney Disease
item.dc:creator: Herrington WG, Staplin N, Wanner C, et al.
item.description: In this double-blind trial, empagliflozin significantly reduced the risk of kidney disease progression in patients with CKD, regardless of diabetes status.
item.content:encoded: In this double-blind trial involving 6609 patients with chronic kidney disease, empagliflozin at a dose of 10 mg significantly reduced the composite risk of kidney disease progression or cardiovascular death compared with placebo (hazard ratio, 0.72; 95% CI, 0.64 to 0.82).

item.title: Tirzepatide versus Semaglutide for & Weight Management
item.dc:creator: Frías JP, Davies MJ, Rosenstock J
item.description: Tirzepatide led to greater reductions in body weight than semaglutide in adults with obesity.

item.title: PCSK9 Inhibition with Inclisiran — Long-Term Efficacy
item.dc:creator: Ray KK, Troquay RPT, Visseren FLJ
item.description: Long-term follow-up of inclisiran shows durable LDL cholesterol reductions over 4 years with twice-yearly dosing.
